q: How to manage non-human identity security risks
diagnostic: Non-human identities are the fastest-growing attack surface in 2026. The Digital Vanguard agent insists that every agent identity be governed by a single operating system with auditable credentials and purpose-scoped permissions.
answer: Non-human identities are the fastest-growing attack surface in 2026. The Digital Vanguard agent insists that every agent identity be governed by a single operating system with auditable credentials and purpose-scoped permissions.
description: Uncontrolled automation — hundreds of disconnected chatbots and automations with no unified command. The CEO is terrified that agents will hallucinate a disaster.
symptom: Black box decisions nobody can explain. Data leaks from uncoordinated AI tools. Compliance teams cannot audit what the AI did.
